{{Quote|You pathetic Rebel scum. You'll never take the Imperial Palace. A legion of the Empire's best troops awaits you!|[[General/Legends|General]] [[Tal Ashen]]|<ref name="GBCC" />}}
'''Elite Force''' was an elite contingent of the [[Coruscant Defense Forces]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Tal Ashen]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the force was tasked with defending the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]]. It was composed of various elite [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-ATs]], [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-STs]], [[TIE Advanced x1/Legends|TIE Advanced x1s]], [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE/D Defenders]], and other Imperial units in its ranks.<ref name="GBCC" /> In [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]],<ref name="TEA" /> it was defeated and suffered significant losses fighting against [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces led by generals [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Rand Talor]] during the [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|Seizure of Coruscant]].<ref name="GBCC" />

==Appearances==
